title: hymenophyllum neesii
intro: Hymenophyllum neesii is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the 'basket fern'. This plant is native to Australia and has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Hymenophyllum neesii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit anticancer properties. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and it can be administered orally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
